title: Tourism company director sentenced to five years in prison for Shiretoko shipwreck
summary: The court sentenced the owner of the company that operated the tourist boat that sank in 2022 in Hokkaido, after considering that he should have suspended navigation.

title: G7 leaders issue joint statement on Iran, Ukraine, and economic cooperation
summary: At the G7 summit, leaders reaffirmed their commitment to prevent Iran from acquiring nuclear weapons, endorsed the peace agreement, and discussed access to artificial intelligence.

title: US and Iran sign memorandum to end conflict and establish reconstruction fund
summary: Both nations signed an agreement in Switzerland that includes a $300 billion fund for Iranian reconstruction and the resumption of gas exports.

title: Messi shines with hat-trick in World Cup while Tunisia changes coach
summary: Lionel Messi scored three goals and tied the historical record of the World Cup, in a tournament marked by controversy over player nationalities and the good conduct of Japanese fans.

title: Magnitude 5.5 earthquake shakes Kanto region in Japan
summary: The earthquake that occurred on the 16th affected the Tokyo metropolitan area, and authorities warn of possible landslides.

title: Japan records trade deficit and record crude oil import price in May
summary: Japan's trade balance turned into a deficit due to the drop in crude oil imports from the Middle East and the increase in energy costs.

title: 60-year-old man injured after being attacked by a bear in Nara
summary: A bear attacked a man in the garden of his house in the town of Shimokitayama, causing injuries to his face.

title: Fraud network in Cambodia and Indonesia dismantled with suspected Japanese leaders
summary: Authorities arrested several Japanese suspects involved in phone scams and money laundering operated from Southeast Asia.

title: Elevated levels of PFAS detected in drinking water and blood of residents in Japan
summary: Analyses in Saitama and Shizuoka revealed abnormal concentrations of perfluoroalkyl substances, while a Japanese company develops a decomposition method.

title: Gasoline price cartel case shakes industry in Japan
summary: The association of gas stations in Nagano apologized for the illicit price fixing, while the Trade Commission investigates possible collusive agreements.

title: SpaceX surpasses Amazon in market value and becomes the fourth most valuable company
summary: Elon Musk's aerospace manufacturer reached a historic market capitalization after a rebound in its shares following the IPO.

title: Yomiuri Giants sign Shinnosuke Ogasawara and Rakuten Eagles name new manager
summary: In the Japanese professional baseball league, teams make significant moves ahead of the next season.

title: Global stock markets reach historic highs driven by Iran peace agreement
summary: The Dow Jones in New York and the Nikkei 225 in Tokyo recorded records thanks to optimism generated by geopolitical détente and interest rate hikes in Japan.

title: Debate in Japan on defense policy: military exports, Self-Defense Forces recruitment, and revision of nuclear principles
summary: Controversial statements about poor young people enlisting in the Self-Defense Forces and proposals from the Innovation Party to relax non-nuclear principles mark the discussion.

title: Japan reflects on its culture: from the decline of bookstores to the recovery of traditions
summary: A variety of cultural news includes the reopening of Ueno Station, the legacy of Osamu Tezuka, the discovery of naval remains in Tsukiji, and the increase in nasal height of Japanese people.

title: Bank of Japan raises interest rate to 1%, highest level since 1995
summary: The monetary authority raised the reference rate in a context of inflationary pressure and expectations of economic normalization.

title: Japan reforms adult guardianship system: lifelong nature eliminated and digital wills introduced
summary: The amendment to the Civil Code allows a more flexible guardianship system and the creation of digital wills, in response to the increase in single-person households.

title: FBI foils plan to attack an event with Donald Trump in attendance
summary: Several people were arrested for conspiring to attack an event that the former US president would attend.

title: Zelenskyy announces Ukrainian attack on Moscow refinery to increase pressure
summary: The Ukrainian president stated that his country's forces attacked a refinery in the Russian capital as part of the military offensive.

title: Russian artist who satirized Putin shot dead
summary: A well-known street artist and Kremlin critic was gunned down in Russia after parodying the president.
